system_packages.name: libsndfile1
system_packages.note: The chosen path succeeded without host-level installation because `soundfile` wheel support was sufficient.

system_packages.name: ffmpeg
system_packages.note: Not required because the selected fixture already matches the repo-native WAV expectations.

important_runtime_assumptions: Use the standalone FireRedAsr2 AED runtime path only.
Use the model-local weights path recorded in `weights_manifest.json`.
Add the copied upstream source snapshot to `sys.path` before import.
